universe: trust-relevant managed assets selected through the route harness's .deps.json, excluding shared-framework assemblies (codex F8); family prefixes Dafny*/Boogie*/System.CommandLine
status: GREEN-CAPTURED 2026-07-21 via the DD-008 procedure: file SHA-256s computed from the runtime-loaded assemblies of a real P03 exercise (verify fixtures/ok.dfy end-to-end), each traced through .deps.json to the spike-local package asset and hash-compared (INV-002)
notes: Set equality, not subset (INV-002/RS-008): any loaded Dafny/Boogie-family assembly outside this mapping fails P03; an expected-but-never-loaded assembly is a failure, never a vacuous pass.
Identity discrimination is by file SHA-256 (beta4 and GA System.CommandLine can share assembly version 2.0.0.0).

Route A observation (DD-001/DD-007 doc-propagation input): DafnyLanguageServer.dll IS loaded on the driver route (CliCompilation constructs the LanguageServer parser/resolver/verifier); DafnyPipeline is NOT loaded on Route A.
DafnyDriver.dll ships without an AssemblyInformationalVersion attribute; its identity is carried by the file digest (RS-008).
